notableEvents.label: Yandy Díaz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yandy Díaz grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Yandy Díaz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Daulton Varsho hits a grand slam (5) to left field. George Springer scores. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores. Kazuma Okamoto scores.
